category_sources: Official README describes a shell script that compiles and runs Objective-C files from the terminal.
source_facts.description says it uses Objective-C files for shell script-like tasks.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use objc-run.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents basic usage, shebang usage, CocoaPods integration, and self checks.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/iljaiwas/objc-run; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README shows terminal invocation, shebang support, and CocoaPods module usage.
